_comment: D5 fixture for /demos/frontend-tools. Triggers a frontend tool call ('change the theme to dark') that the demo handles client-side; the agent acknowledges the tool ran. Substring 'switch theme to dark mode' is unique.

response.content: Done — the change_theme tool was invoked and the page is now in dark mode. Frontend tools were registered via useCopilotAction and the agent dispatched the call client-side.
